search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: Debbie Reynolds, who sang and danced to fame in Singin' in the Rain, dies at 84. From 1950 to 1967, Debbie Reynolds appeared in more than 30 movie musicals and light comedies. Debbie Reynolds' life was the stuff of movie legend, from her start as an ingenue playing opposite Gene Kelly in the classic 1952 musical Singin' in the Rain, to her part in one of Hollywood's most notable roles.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about Debbie Reynolds and a film, not about strategies to get better at sports.
